COURT TRIAL ON NOV-12-2002 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. COURT TRIAL HELD--UNLAWFUL DETAINER: WIT. S/EXM'D, DOC. EVID. INTRDC'D & MRK'D; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT(S); COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT SHANE O'NEIL AND ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS INCLUSIVE AS TO POSSESSION OF ENTIRE PREMISES LOCATED AT 240 OAK ST., APT. A, S.F., CA;ALL AGREEMENTS FORFEITED; LEASE FORFEITED & DECLARED VOID & OF NO EFFECT; $3,102.00 FOR UNPAID RENT; PLAINTIFF ALSO IS AWARDED COSTS PURSUANT TO COST BILL TO BE SUBMITTED; WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE FORTHWITH & SHERIFF MAY POST APPROPRIATE NOTICE(S) AND TAKE NECESSARY STEPS TO RESTORE POSSESSION OF PREMISET TO PLAINTIFF. COURT SIGNS JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CLAUDE D. PERASSO; CSR: FLOYD BUTLER, #2518; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (DEPT. 414, 400 MCALLISTER ST.).

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Steven Williams, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court orderd the matter off the Settlement Conference Calendar. The request for jury demand is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
